title: aggregate-flow input spec
description:
Spec passed to ``hpc-agent aggregate-flow --spec <file>``.

Workflow atom that ensures every wave is combined on the cluster,
pulls the per-wave partials locally, and merges them into a
single aggregated-metrics dict via reduce_partials. Pairs with
submit-flow + monitor-flow as the third workflow atom in the
campaign composition pattern.

output_dir.description: Local destination for pulled artifacts. Null defaults to `<experiment_dir>/_aggregated/<run_id>/`. The combiner partials land under `<output_dir>/_combiner/`.
output_dir.title: Output Dir

ensure_all_combined.description: Before pulling, invoke combine-wave for every wave in the sidecar's wave_map that isn't yet in combined_waves. Disable when monitor-flow already combined everything in flight (idempotent either way; this just saves SSH round-trips).
ensure_all_combined.title: Ensure All Combined

combiner_max_retries.description: Times to retry combine-wave with force=true after first failure. Beyond this, the wave is escalated and surfaces in failed_waves; aggregate-flow continues with whichever waves DID combine.
combiner_max_retries.title: Combiner Max Retries

pull_summaries.description: After pulling _combiner/, also rsync result summary files matching summary_glob from the cluster's results/ directory.
pull_summaries.title: Pull Summaries

summary_glob.description: Required when pull_summaries=true. Rsync include pattern (e.g. 'metrics.json', 'qlike.json'). Ignored when pull_summaries=false.
summary_glob.title: Summary Glob

results_subdir.description: Cluster-side subdir under remote_path that holds the per-task result trees. Defaults to 'results' to match the framework convention.
results_subdir.title: Results Subdir
